name: Pasta with Vodka
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Penne or other tubular pasta
2/3 cup Vodka, preferably Polish or Russian
1/4 tsp Hot red pepper flakes (or more to taste)
16 oz Italian plum tomatoes, drained and seeded, then pureed
(Alternatively, 3/4 cup Ponchi crushed tomatoes can be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling salted water, cook the penne until al dente (tender but firm) for 8 to 10 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, melt the butter in a large nonreactive skillet over moderate heat.
3. Add the vodka and hot pepper flakes, and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Add the pureed tomatoes and salt, and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. When the pasta is al dente, drain it well and add it to the skillet with the sauce.
6. Reduce the heat to low, add the Parmesan cheese, and mix thoroughly.
7. Serve hot with a salad and good bread. This dish serves 4 to 6 people.
